name: Seated Cable Row
setup: Sit at row station, feet on platform, knees slightly bent
Lean forward, grab handle (V-grip, straight bar, or rope)
Start with arms extended, torso upright
execution: Drive elbows behind you, squeeze shoulder blades
Torso stays mostly upright (small lean allowed)
Control back to full arm extension
common_mistakes: Using too much torso lean (turning into a rock)
Pulling with arms only (no back engagement)
Rounding lower back at full extension
Pulling too high (bar to neck instead of sternum)
